data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of locking the invoice currency after confirmation. However, the evidence shows that the bookings were confirmed in USD without any indication of a currency lock mechanism or conversion rate snapshot being applied. This indicates a clear gap in the evidence as it does not demonstrate that the invoice currency was locked post-confirmation, which is essential for fulfilling the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of invoice currency lock after confirmation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
